features.name: CompanyQueue — select contacts needing company enrichment
features.description: SELECT crm_contacts WHERE company_name IS NOT NULL AND (company_intel_at IS NULL OR company_intel_at < NOW()-30days) AND pipeline_stage NOT IN ('closed_won','closed_lost','archived') ORDER BY icp_score DESC LIMIT 50. Add company_intel_at column via migration

features.name: PerplexityClient — reuse existing AAG-09 client for company research
features.description: Reuse PerplexityClient from aag-agent-09-entity-resolution.py. Query template: 'What does {company} do? Who are their customers? What problem do they solve? What is their estimated ARR or funding stage? What tools or services do they use?' Return raw text response

features.name: ClaudeParser — extract structured CompanyIntel from Perplexity response
features.description: Send Perplexity raw text to Claude Haiku with structured extraction prompt. Extract: company_description (2 sentences), customer_type (b2b/b2c/both), estimated_arr_range (e.g. '$1M-$10M'), funding_stage (bootstrap/seed/series_a/etc), tools_used[], pain_points[], is_agency bool. Return CompanyIntel dataclass

features.name: ICPScoreModifier — adjust contact ICP score based on company signals
features.description: Apply score deltas: +15 if customer_type='b2b', +10 if estimated_arr_range matches target (>$100K), +10 if funding_stage in ['series_a','series_b','growth'], +5 if uses competitor tools, -10 if is_agency=True and not target. UPDATE crm_contacts.icp_score += delta WHERE delta != 0. Log reason

features.name: crm_company_intel Supabase upsert
features.description: UPSERT to crm_company_intel(contact_id, company_name, company_description, customer_type, estimated_arr_range, funding_stage, tools_used, pain_points, is_agency, perplexity_raw, claude_parsed, score_delta, enriched_at). ON CONFLICT(contact_id) DO UPDATE. Apply migration for table

features.name: crm_contacts.company_intel_at update
features.description: After successful upsert: UPDATE crm_contacts SET company_intel_at=NOW(), icp_score_reasoning=icp_score_reasoning||' [company: {reason}]' WHERE id=contact_id. Ensures EnrichmentGate sees enriched contacts and staleness is tracked

features.name: CompanyIntelligenceAgent.run() — main enrichment loop
features.description: Main entry: get CompanyQueue batch → for each contact: query Perplexity → parse with Claude → apply ICP delta → upsert crm_company_intel → update company_intel_at. Rate limit: 1 contact per 3 seconds (Perplexity API). Return IntelResult with enriched_count, score_changes[]

features.name: DM personalization hook — inject company intel into ContactBrief
features.description: Extend ContextBuilder (AAG-051): after loading top posts, query crm_company_intel for contact. If found, add company_description and pain_points to ContactBrief. Update DM generation prompt to reference 'their company focus: {company_description}' when available

features.name: CLI — python3 acquisition/company_intelligence_agent.py --run
features.description: CLI flags: --contact-id (single), --dry-run (Perplexity query + Claude parse, no writes), --limit N, --force (ignore staleness). Print enrichment table with company, ICP delta, customer_type per contact. Matches AAG harness pattern

features.name: Cron registration — company_intel nightly at 3AM
features.description: Register cron_definitions.py entry: company_intel (daily 3AM). Triggers CompanyIntelligenceAgent.run() with limit=50. Gate behind ENABLE_COMPANY_INTEL config flag. Runs after post_enrichment (2AM) so ICP scores are fresh before company enrichment

features.name: crm_company_intel Supabase table migration
features.description: CREATE TABLE crm_company_intel: id uuid PK, contact_id uuid UNIQUE FK crm_contacts, company_name text, company_description text, customer_type text, estimated_arr_range text, funding_stage text, tools_used text[], pain_points text[], is_agency bool, perplexity_raw text, claude_parsed jsonb, score_delta int, enriched_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()

features.name: POST /api/acquisition/enrich/company endpoint
features.description: HTTP endpoint: accept contact_id or batch, trigger company enrichment, return IntelResult. Supports dry_run. Returns extracted CompanyIntel objects for review. Useful for dashboard inspection of enrichment quality

features.name: Tests — unit tests for Perplexity query, Claude parser, ICP modifier
features.description: pytest: test_perplexity_query_template_format, test_claude_parser_extracts_customer_type, test_icp_score_modifier_b2b_bonus, test_icp_modifier_agency_penalty, test_company_intel_upsert_on_conflict. Mock Perplexity and Claude API responses

features.name: PERPLEXITY_API_KEY config and fallback
features.description: Read PERPLEXITY_API_KEY from config.py via os.getenv. If missing, log warning and skip company enrichment for that contact (do not fail batch). Add PERPLEXITY_API_KEY to .env.example. Reuse same key already configured for AAG-09 entity resolution
